intentSynonyms: update a slide text in powerpoint
edit a slide text in powerpoint
change the details of slide text in powerpoint
modify a slide text in powerpoint
modify text on a slide in powerpoint
description: Update the text content of a specific slide. Downloads the PPTX, modifies the slide XML, and re-uploads. Use newline characters to separate lines within a text box.

item_id.description: Item ID of the PowerPoint file

text.description: New text content for the slide (use \n for line breaks)
